papers.title: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems
papers.brief: 提出一种「工具制造」流水线，让LLM智能体将反复执行的标准操作步骤预编译为经验证的版本化工具，运行时直接调用而非每次重新生成代码，并在仓储中心告警分诊系统中完成工业级部署验证。
papers.tldr: 将LLM智能体重复执行的SOP步骤预编译为可复用工具，降低延迟42%、错误率53%
papers.what_it_is: 提出一种「工具制造」流水线，让LLM智能体将反复执行的标准操作步骤预编译为经验证的版本化工具，运行时直接调用而非每次重新生成代码，并在仓储中心告警分诊系统中完成工业级部署验证。
key_points: 工具制造器通过收集执行轨迹、观察后端Schema自动合成并修复候选工具，形成自进化闭环
生产环境中工具调用将p50延迟降低42%，历史告警端到端错误率降低最高53%
结构化工具返回值支持更简洁的直接调用架构，进一步将p50延迟再降62%（消融实验）
版本化工具提升可审计性，并能暴露规范缺口与上游数据漂移问题
papers.why_notable: 将LLM智能体从「每次推理生成代码」转变为「预编译工具库+按需回退」的工程范式，在真实工业系统中取得显著延迟与可靠性提升，为LLM智能体落地生产提供了可复制的方法论。
papers.abstract: Production LLM agents often waste latency and reliability by regenerating code for the same procedural steps on every request. We replace this inference-time coding loop with an agentic tool-making pipeline that compiles repeated SOP steps into validated, versioned tools before deployment. The tool-maker grounds synthesis in the live environment as it collects execution traces, observes backend schemas and values, generates candidate tools, and repairs them against labeled cases. At runtime, the production agent calls these tools directly and falls back to code generation only when needed. We deploy the approach in a Fulfillment Center alarm-triage system, where an agent diagnoses alarms against a 44-node SOP over heterogeneous metric backends. In production, tool calls reduce p50 latency by 42%. On 1,500 historical alarms, they reduce end-to-end error rate by up to 53% by suppressing run-to-run variance in repeated steps. Because tools return compact structured verdicts, they also enable a simpler direct-call architecture, reducing p50 latency by a further 62% in a controlled ablation. Versioned tools also improve auditability and expose specification gaps and upstream data drift. Our results show that self-evolving agents can make industrial LLM systems faster, more reliable, and easier to operate.

papers.title: DeepSWE: Measuring Frontier Coding Agents on Original, Long-Horizon Engineering Tasks
papers.brief: 提出DeepSWE基准测试集，包含113个全新手写的软件工程任务，用于评估编程智能体的真实问题解决能力，而非记忆能力。任务覆盖91个活跃开源仓库和5种编程语言，配备手写验证器而非原始PR测试。
papers.tldr: DeepSWE：113个原创长周期软件工程任务基准，避免训练数据污染和测试用例偏差
papers.what_it_is: 提出DeepSWE基准测试集，包含113个全新手写的软件工程任务，用于评估编程智能体的真实问题解决能力，而非记忆能力。任务覆盖91个活跃开源仓库和5种编程语言，配备手写验证器而非原始PR测试。
key_points: 任务从零编写且不回流至上游仓库，确保参考解决方案不会出现在模型训练数据中，避免数据污染
手写验证器检查功能正确性而非特定实现，与LLM裁判的分歧率仅1.4%，远低于SWE-Bench Pro的32.4%
参考解决方案平均涉及代码量是SWE-Bench Pro的5.5倍，且能在更宽分数区间区分前沿智能体
papers.why_notable: 现有主流编程基准（如SWE-bench）存在训练数据污染和测试用例偏差两大根本缺陷，DeepSWE系统性地解决了这两个问题，为真实评估编程智能体能力提供了更可靠的基准，对领域评估体系具有重要参考价值。
papers.abstract: DeepSWE is a benchmark of 113 original, long-horizon software engineering tasks for evaluating coding agents. Most public agentic coding benchmarks follow SWE-bench in mining merged fixes from public GitHub repositories, which creates two problems: the fixes and their discussion were likely seen during pretraining, so a high score can reflect recall rather than problem-solving; and each task is graded by the tests that shipped with its merged fix, which were written to confirm one specific fix rather than grade an arbitrary solution, so they can fail a correct alternative or pass an incomplete one. DeepSWE avoids both. Its tasks are written from scratch across 91 active open-source repositories and five languages and are never contributed back upstream, so their reference solutions stay out of the public record that model training scrapes; and each task is graded by a hand-written verifier that checks the requested functionality and accepts any implementation that provides it. When an independent LLM judge re-reviews graded runs, it disagrees with DeepSWE's verifier about an order of magnitude less often than with SWE-Bench Pro's inherited tests (1.4% versus 32.4%). Despite being about half the length of SWE-Bench Pro's prompts, DeepSWE's prompts describe tasks whose reference solutions touch 5.5x more code, and the benchmark separates frontier agents across a wider score band than the leaderboards on which they otherwise cluster. We release the benchmark, its verifiers, and the full record of evaluation trajectories.

papers.title: When Does Continual Learning Require Learning
papers.brief: 本文重新审视大语言模型的持续学习问题，将环境变化分解为空间（新领域）和时间（数据漂移）两个维度，并在统一协议下对比评估多类方法（提示、监督学习、强化学习、上下文压缩）的适应能力。
papers.tldr: 系统研究LLM持续学习：不同环境变化需要根本不同的更新策略
papers.what_it_is: 本文重新审视大语言模型的持续学习问题，将环境变化分解为空间（新领域）和时间（数据漂移）两个维度，并在统一协议下对比评估多类方法（提示、监督学习、强化学习、上下文压缩）的适应能力。
key_points: 提出空间（新领域）与时间（事实漂移）两轴框架，将主流LLM基准重构为序列问题进行评测
在线强化学习（GRPO/SDPO）对知识更新适应最有效，但对噪声奖励信号敏感；蒸馏方法知识积累稳定但难以更新过时事实
提示类方法快速适应新阶段但在未来任务上退化；上下文压缩提升效率但不显著提升新任务学习能力
papers.why_notable: 首次在统一协议下系统比较多类持续学习方法，揭示"持续学习并非单一能力"，为设计更强持续学习系统提供了清晰的方法选择指南，对LLM实际部署具有重要指导价值。
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) become increasingly capable, the next question is how can we enable models to continually learn? Today, the field largely frames this as a problem of context management and mitigating forgetting. We argue this framing is incomplete: continual learning is fundamentally about increasing model competence as the world changes. We disentangle this change along two axes -- space, where the model encounters new domains, and time, where the underlying data drifts under a fixed task. This framing lets us study continual learning under realistic conditions: new domains arrive over time, facts drift past their training cutoff, and agentic interactions accumulate state across episodes. To evaluate methods under this setting, we recast widely used LLM benchmarks as sequential problems and introduce a single mechanism-agnostic protocol that compares prompt-based methods (GEPA, ACE), supervised learning (SFT, SDFT), reinforcement learning (GRPO, SDPO), and context compression (Cartridges, In-place TTT). Prompt-based methods fit each new stage quickly but degrade on future tasks. Distillation-based methods accumulate knowledge stably but struggle to update outdated facts. Context compression improves efficiency without substantially improving the ability to learn new tasks. Online reinforcement learning adapts most effectively to knowledge updates but remains sensitive to noisy reward signals. Overall, our results suggest that continual learning is not a single capability: different patterns of environmental change require fundamentally different update behaviors, determining when adaptation must be learned inside model weights and when it can be achieved through external scaffolding. We hope that understanding where each method succeeds and fails will guide the design of stronger continual learning systems.

papers.title: Agentic AI and Retrieval-Augmented Models in Straight-Through Underwriting
papers.brief: 本文构建了一个面向小型商业业主保单（BOP）直通式核保的多智能体AI框架，对比了单LLM基线、朴素RAG系统和多智能体Agentic RAG三种核保流水线的性能表现。
papers.tldr: 多智能体RAG框架用于商业保险直通式核保，显著提升复杂场景决策准确性
papers.what_it_is: 本文构建了一个面向小型商业业主保单（BOP）直通式核保的多智能体AI框架，对比了单LLM基线、朴素RAG系统和多智能体Agentic RAG三种核保流水线的性能表现。
key_points: 多智能体Agentic RAG系统整合了定向检索、第三方数据校验和显式多步规则评估，在整体表现上优于单LLM和朴素RAG方案
在多步推理和信息缺失场景中提升最为显著，结构化检索与反思机制有效避免了无依据的直通决策
框架设计兼顾精算优先级：透明性、可审计性和人机协同治理，适配受监管的决策工作流
papers.why_notable: 将LLM/RAG/多智能体技术落地于高度监管的保险核保场景，提供了可复现的合成实验环境与系统对比，对金融/保险AI合规应用具有重要参考价值
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is beginning to reshape actuarial practice, particularly in domains that require reasoning over unstructured documents, heterogeneous data sources, and regulated decision workflows. Actuaries now face a design space that ranges from traditional rule-based automation to large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and multi-agent ``agentic'' systems that plan, retrieve, call tools, and reflect. This paper examines how these emerging architectures can support actuarial priorities such as transparency, auditability, and human-in-the-loop governance, with a focus on straight-through decision processes. To make these ideas concrete, we develop and analyze an agentic AI framework for straight-through underwriting of small commercial Business Owner Policies (BOPs). We construct a synthetic but realistic experimental environment and compare three underwriting pipelines: (i) a single-LLM baseline, (ii) a naive RAG system, and (iii) a multi-agent ``Agentic RAG'' pipeline that combines targeted retrieval, third-party data checks, and explicit multi-step rule evaluation. The agentic system performs best overall, with the largest gains in multi-step and missing-information scenarios, where structured retrieval and reflection help the model avoid unsupported straight-through decisions.

papers.title: KronQ: LLM Quantization via Kronecker-Factored Hessian
papers.brief: 提出KronQ量化框架，通过Kronecker分解Hessian近似将梯度协方差引入量化目标，同时实现双向不相干处理和基于Hessian迹的混合精度分配策略。
papers.tldr: KronQ引入梯度协方差改进LLM训练后量化，2-bit量化效果大幅优于GPTQ
papers.what_it_is: 提出KronQ量化框架，通过Kronecker分解Hessian近似将梯度协方差引入量化目标，同时实现双向不相干处理和基于Hessian迹的混合精度分配策略。
key_points: 现有GPTQ等方法仅利用输入激活统计，隐含假设所有输出通道贡献相等；KronQ通过Kronecker分解Hessian同时考虑激活与梯度协方差
双向不相干处理：将随机旋转从输入侧扩展到输出维度，利用梯度协方差降低权重幅度方差
2-bit量化LLaMA-3-70B时，GPTQ/GPTAQ困惑度发散（>2000），KronQ达到7.93的WikiText-2困惑度
papers.why_notable: 在极低比特（2-bit）量化场景下解决了现有方法完全失效的问题，且方法无需重训练，对大模型部署具有重要实用价值
papers.abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is a widely adopted technique for compressing large language models (LLMs) without retraining. Existing second-order PTQ methods, including GPTQ, construct quantization objectives exclusively from input activation statistics, effectively assuming that all output channels contribute equally to the layer-wise reconstruction objective. We propose KronQ, a PTQ framework that challenges this assumption by introducing the gradient covariance into the quantization pipeline. Under the Kronecker-factored Hessian approximation, the quantization loss depends jointly on both the activation and gradient covariances, and KronQ exploits this at two complementary levels. (1) KronQ introduces bidirectional incoherence processing, extending the existing input-side random rotation to the output dimension using the gradient covariance, reducing weight magnitude variance across both input and output dimensions. (2) KronQ derives a new sensitivity metric for inter-layer mixed-precision allocation, driven by the gradient and activation Hessian traces. Notably, in the case of 2-bit weight-only quantization on LLaMA-3-70B, while GPTQ and GPTAQ diverge or produce degenerate quantizations (>2000 perplexity on WikiText-2), KronQ achieves 7.93 perplexity.

papers.title: Efficient Safety Alignment of Language Models via Latent Personality Traits
papers.brief: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，通过对心理测量人格陈述进行对抗训练，隐式约束越狱攻击所利用的潜在子空间，无需接触有害内容即可实现安全对齐。
papers.tldr: 用66条人格心理测量语句替代有害内容训练，实现高效鲁棒的LLM安全对齐
papers.what_it_is: 提出潜在人格对齐（LPA）方法，通过对心理测量人格陈述进行对抗训练，隐式约束越狱攻击所利用的潜在子空间，无需接触有害内容即可实现安全对齐。
key_points: 仅使用66条与危害无关的人格心理测量语句进行对抗训练，比标准LAT少75倍训练样本
在HarmBench上对直接请求和五种越狱方法均实现接近零的攻击成功率
单GPU上训练仅需数分钟，且不损失标准基准测试性能
papers.why_notable: 突破了安全对齐必须依赖大量有害内容数据集的范式，以极低成本实现强鲁棒性，对实际部署具有重要实用价值，同时揭示了人格表征与危害规避之间的潜在结构关联。
papers.abstract: Current safety methods for large language models are known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks, motivating research into robust alternatives. Latent Adversarial Training (LAT) is among the most effective defenses, but can degrade utility and requires training on large datasets of harmful prompts. We introduce Latent Personality Alignment (LPA), which replaces explicit harm refusal with adversarial training on just 66 harm-agnostic statements drawn from psychometric personality literature. We hypothesize that personality-anchored representations share latent structure with harm avoidance, so adversarially stabilizing them implicitly constrains the subspace exploited by jailbreak attacks. LPA achieves near-zero attack success rates on HarmBench across direct requests and five jailbreak methods, despite never seeing harmful content during training and no loss of performance on standard benchmarks. Moreover, the training process is lightweight; the entire procedure completes in minutes on a single GPU and uses 75x fewer examples than standard LAT. Extensive ablations demonstrate the robustness, efficiency, and generalization of our method.

papers.title: A law of robustness for two-layer neural networks with arbitrary weights
papers.brief: 本文证明了Bubeck-Li-Nagaraj关于双层神经网络鲁棒性的猜想：对于通用数据，任意权重的双层神经网络若拟合n个噪声标签，其Lipschitz常数必须至少为√(n/m)量级（差一个对数因子），适用于所有连续分段线性激活函数（包括ReLU）。
papers.tldr: 证明双层神经网络鲁棒性定律：拟合n个噪声标签的宽度m网络Lipschitz常数至少为√(n/m)量级
papers.what_it_is: 本文证明了Bubeck-Li-Nagaraj关于双层神经网络鲁棒性的猜想：对于通用数据，任意权重的双层神经网络若拟合n个噪声标签，其Lipschitz常数必须至少为√(n/m)量级（差一个对数因子），适用于所有连续分段线性激活函数（包括ReLU）。
key_points: 突破无界权重限制：通过函数空间覆盖代替参数空间覆盖，绕开了Bubeck-Sellke定理要求参数有界的假设
核心刚性引理：在d≥3维球面上，每个典范折痕系数被函数Lipschitz常数控制，因为不同超平面上的折痕在通用点不能相消
d=2时刚性真正失效，并给出显式宽度2n的ReLU插值构造，Lipschitz常数为O(1)，与定律在过参数化端点吻合
papers.why_notable: 完整证明了一个重要的开放猜想，揭示了神经网络过参数化与鲁棒性之间的基本权衡规律，对理解深度学习泛化与对抗鲁棒性具有重要理论意义
papers.abstract: Bubeck, Li and Nagaraj conjectured that, for generic data, any two-layer neural network with $m$ neurons that fits $n$ noisy labels must have Lipschitz constant at least of order $\sqrt{n/m}$, with no restriction on the size of the weights. Bubeck and Sellke proved a universal version of this law for Lipschitz-parameterized classes, but under a polynomial bound on the parameters; at depth three that boundedness hypothesis is genuinely necessary. The two-layer unbounded-weight case requires a different argument. We prove the conjectured law, up to one logarithmic factor, for every continuous piecewise-linear activation, in particular for ReLU networks. For data drawn uniformly from $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$, $d\ge3$, or from $N(0,I_d/d)$, labels in $[-1,1]$ with noise level $σ^2>0$, and any width-$m$ two-layer network with arbitrary real weights, biases and affine skip connection, fitting the data $\varepsilon$ below the noise floor forces $\mathrm{Lip}(f)\ge c\,\varepsilon\sqrt{n/(\bar m\log(C\bar m nd/\varepsilon))}$, $\bar m=(K-1)m+1$, with high probability. A realized-kink-count version holds on the same event: every realized two-layer piecewise-linear function with $k(f)\le n$ distinct kink hyperplanes obeys the bound with $\bar m$ replaced by $k(f)+1$, irrespective of how many redundant hidden units parameterize it. The proof replaces parameter-space covering, impossible for unbounded weights, by a function-space covering. The central deterministic ingredient is a rigidity lemma: on $B_2$, and on $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ for $d\ge3$, the coefficient of each canonical kink is controlled by the Lipschitz constant of the realized function, because kinks on distinct hyperplanes cannot cancel at generic points. Rigidity genuinely fails at $d=2$, and an explicit two-layer ReLU interpolant with $O(1)$ Lipschitz constant at width $2n$ matches the law at the overparameterized endpoint.

papers.title: Principled Analysis of Deep Reinforcement Learning Evaluation and Design Paradigms
papers.brief: 本文对深度强化学习的主流评估与设计范式进行原理性分析，提出强化学习中缩放定律的理论基础，并通过大规模实验证明现有标准评估范式导致了错误结论。
papers.tldr: 揭示深度强化学习评估范式存在系统性缺陷，算法性能排名随数据规模非单调变化
papers.what_it_is: 本文对深度强化学习的主流评估与设计范式进行原理性分析，提出强化学习中缩放定律的理论基础，并通过大规模实验证明现有标准评估范式导致了错误结论。
key_points: 理论证明强化学习算法的渐近性能与数据规模之间不存在单调关系，即小数据下排名靠前的算法在大数据下未必更优
大规模实验验证：现有主流设计与评估范式下得出的多项研究结论存在系统性错误
提供了关于深度强化学习缩放性、容量与复杂度的核心分析框架
papers.why_notable: 直接挑战强化学习领域过去十年的主流评估方法论，指出大量已发表研究结论可能因评估范式缺陷而失效，对整个领域的基准测试与算法比较方式具有深远影响。
papers.abstract: Starting from the utilization of deep neural networks to approximate the state-action value function that led to winning one of the most challenging games, to algorithmic advancements that allowed solving problems without even explicitly stating the rules of the challenge at hand, reinforcement learning research has been the center of remarkable scientific progress for the past decade. In this paper, we focus on the key ingredients of this research progress and we analyze the canonical evaluation and design paradigms in reinforcement learning. We introduce the theoretical foundations of scaling laws in reinforcement learning and show that the asymptotic performance of reinforcement learning algorithms does not have a monotone relationship between performance rankings and data-regimes. We conduct large-scale experiments and our results demonstrate that a line of reinforcement learning research under the canonical design and evaluation paradigms resulted in incorrect conclusions. Our analysis and results provide a core analysis on scaling, capacity and complexity of deep reinforcement learning.

papers.title: APIVOT: Adaptive Planning with Interleaved Vision-Language Thoughts
papers.brief: 提出APIVOT，一种基于VLM的机器人规划器，能自适应地交错使用语言推理（语义分解）和视觉思维（想象未来状态）来验证几何可行性，实现长时程任务规划。
papers.tldr: APIVOT：自适应交错视觉-语言思维的长时程机器人规划框架
papers.what_it_is: 提出APIVOT，一种基于VLM的机器人规划器，能自适应地交错使用语言推理（语义分解）和视觉思维（想象未来状态）来验证几何可行性，实现长时程任务规划。
key_points: 自适应交错机制：动态选择语言或视觉思维模态，语言负责语义推理，视觉思维作为内部想象状态验证空间约束
在长时程厨房任务基准上超越通用VLM和已有规划框架，在空间受限场景（有限空间、物体碰撞）中提升最为显著
模型学到了有意义的模态选择行为，证明自适应交错同时提升规划成功率和推理效率
papers.why_notable: 首次将视觉思维作为'想象未来状态'引入机器人规划的内部验证机制，解决了纯语言规划无法处理几何约束的核心痛点，对具身智能长时程规划具有重要实用价值。
papers.abstract: Long-horizon robot planning requires jointly reasoning over semantic task structure and geometric feasibility. To successfully execute a task, a robot must decompose goals, select task-relevant objects, and sequence actions, while ensuring that plans satisfy spatial constraints such as limited free space and object collisions. In this work, we propose APIVOT, a VLM-based planner that adaptively interleaves language and visual thoughts for long-horizon planning. APIVOT learns to leverage language for semantic reasoning, while using visual thoughts as imagined future states for internal verification of geometric feasibility. On long-horizon kitchen tasks, APIVOT outperforms general-purpose VLMs and prior planning frameworks, achieving the largest gains in spatially constrained settings. We find that APIVOT learns meaningful modality selection behavior, demonstrating that adaptive interleaving of vision-language thoughts improves both planning success and reasoning efficiency.

papers.title: Provably Optimal Learning Algorithms for Assistance Games
papers.brief: 本文研究辅助博弈（assistance games）的在线变体，提出首个可证明高效的学习算法，使知情智能体（人类）与非知情智能体（助手）在T步交互中最小化辅助遗憾（assistance regret）。
papers.tldr: 首次为辅助博弈提出可证明最优的在线学习算法，实现近似遗憾率最优界
papers.what_it_is: 本文研究辅助博弈（assistance games）的在线变体，提出首个可证明高效的学习算法，使知情智能体（人类）与非知情智能体（助手）在T步交互中最小化辅助遗憾（assistance regret）。
key_points: 提出去中心化算法，实现(1-1/e)近似辅助遗憾率 Õ(T^{3/4})，运行时间关于动作和状态空间多项式
证明超越(1-1/e)近似因子在计算上不可行，即该近似比是最优的
在伪去中心化设置（共享随机串）下，遗憾率提升至 Õ(T^{1/2})，达到对数因子意义下的最优
papers.why_notable: 首次为辅助博弈提供可证明高效算法并给出匹配的计算下界，对AI对齐与人机协作的理论基础具有重要意义
papers.abstract: This paper studies an online variant of the assistance games framework, where an informed agent and an uninformed agent repeatedly interact over $T$ timesteps to optimize a common reward function. While the informed agent (the human) observes a latent state of the world, the uninformed agent (the assistant) observes only the human's actions. We provide the first provably efficient learning algorithms for repeated assistance games. We introduce the notion of assistance regret: the gap between the cumulative utility of interactions and that of the optimal joint policies in hindsight, which map latent states to action pairs. We present decentralized algorithms for both the human and the assistant that achieve a $(1-1/e)$-approximate assistance regret rate of $\widetilde{O}(T^{3/4})$, with runtime polynomial in the size of the action and state spaces. These algorithms are general; in particular, they accommodate any no-regret algorithm for the assistant. We prove that achieving a regret approximation factor better than $(1-1/e)$ is computationally intractable. Furthermore, we demonstrate how these generic no-regret algorithms can be tailored to a pseudo-decentralized setting -- using a shared random string -- to achieve a rate of $\widetilde{O}(T^{1/2})$, optimal up to logarithmic factors.

papers.title: Beware What You Autocomplete: Forensic Attribution of Backdoored Code Completions
papers.brief: 提出CodeTracer取证框架，能够在模型部署后仅凭微调语料和错误补全事件，将恶意代码补全行为追溯至具体的后门微调数据，实现攻击溯源。
papers.tldr: CodeTracer框架可追溯恶意代码补全至后门微调数据，实现精准取证归因
papers.what_it_is: 提出CodeTracer取证框架，能够在模型部署后仅凭微调语料和错误补全事件，将恶意代码补全行为追溯至具体的后门微调数据，实现攻击溯源。
key_points: 从被攻击输出中提取结构化行为指纹，缩小语义相关代码样本搜索范围
利用LLM推理将不安全逻辑归因至特定后门数据
在3类漏洞场景、10种后门攻击和16个基线对比中均表现出高取证准确率和低误判率
papers.why_notable: 现有防御手段难以应对自适应后门攻击，CodeTracer另辟蹊径从取证溯源角度切入，为LLM代码补全系统的安全审计提供了新思路，具有重要实用价值。
papers.abstract: Large language models have enabled powerful code completion systems that assist developers by predicting subsequent lines of code. However, these models remain vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where malicious fine-tuning data covertly implants unsafe behaviors. Despite advances in defensive techniques, adaptive and sophisticated backdoor attacks still evade detection and mitigation. We present CodeTracer, a forensic framework that traces malicious code completions back to the backdoor fine-tuning data responsible for them. Operating under realistic post-deployment constraints, CodeTracer relies solely on the fine-tuning corpus and the reported miscompletion event. It extracts a structured behavioral fingerprint from the compromised output, narrows the search to semantically relevant code samples, and employs LLM-based reasoning to attribute unsafe logic to specific backdoor data. Extensive evaluations across three representative vulnerability cases and ten backdoor attacks, along with sixteen competitive baselines, demonstrate that CodeTracer consistently achieves high forensic accuracy, low false identification rates, and strong robustness against adaptive attacks.

papers.title: Hallucination Self-Play: Bootstrapping Reinforced Detector via Evolved Generator
papers.brief: 提出Hallucination Self-Play（HSP）框架，让检测器与生成器从同一基础模型出发相互博弈：生成器通过强化学习生成越来越难被检测的幻觉内容，检测器则利用这些数据持续优化，实现无需外部监督的自举提升。
papers.tldr: 提出幻觉自博弈框架，通过检测器与生成器相互进化来提升幻觉检测能力
papers.what_it_is: 提出Hallucination Self-Play（HSP）框架，让检测器与生成器从同一基础模型出发相互博弈：生成器通过强化学习生成越来越难被检测的幻觉内容，检测器则利用这些数据持续优化，实现无需外部监督的自举提升。
key_points: 检测器先在人工标注数据上微调，再作为奖励模型通过RLAIF训练生成器产生更难检测的幻觉
进化后的生成器合成新幻觉数据，再通过基于规则的强化学习进一步优化检测器，形成闭环迭代
在RAGTruth基准上，小型LLM经HSP训练后可媲美甚至超越更大的先进LLM，无需外部监督
papers.why_notable: 首次将自博弈机制引入幻觉检测领域，突破了生成器静态不变的局限，以低成本小模型实现与大模型相当的幻觉检测性能，对RAG等实际应用场景具有重要价值。
papers.abstract: Identifying faithfulness hallucinations in LLM-generated outputs remains challenging due to the scarcity of high-quality annotated data. Recent work relies on advanced LLMs to synthesize training data, including rationales, labels, and hallucinated claims. However, these methods treat the generator as a static component, limiting iterative improvement of the detector. To address this limitation, we introduce Hallucination Self-Play (HSP), a novel framework that enables the detector to bootstrap with an evolved generator. HSP involves two roles initialized from the same base model, a detector that assesses the faithfulness of model outputs, and a generator that produces increasingly hard-to-detect hallucinated responses. Specifically, the detector is first fine-tuned on human-labeled data and then employed as a reward model to train the generator via reinforcement learning from AI feedback (RLAIF). In turn, the evolved generator synthesizes hallucination data to further optimize the detector through rule-based reinforcement learning. Experiments on RAGTruth benchmark and two model families demonstrate that the proposed framework can progressively enhance a small LLM to match or even outperform advanced LLMs without external supervision. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Hallucination-Self-Play-50B5 .

papers.title: Who Broke the System? Failure Localization in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
papers.brief: 提出AgentLocate框架，用于LLM多智能体系统的故障归因，能同时识别出哪个智能体出错以及轨迹中最早的决定性失误步骤。
papers.tldr: AgentLocate框架精准定位多智能体系统中的故障责任方与最早失误步骤
papers.what_it_is: 提出AgentLocate框架，用于LLM多智能体系统的故障归因，能同时识别出哪个智能体出错以及轨迹中最早的决定性失误步骤。
key_points: 结合LLM裁判机制与多视角独立评估器，通过置信度感知策略聚合评估结果
利用归因反馈对裁判模型进行轻量级微调，持续提升归因质量
在两个涵盖多样任务、智能体配置和轨迹长度的基准上验证，性能优于现有方法且token消耗高效
papers.why_notable: 多智能体系统故障诊断是落地部署的关键痛点，AgentLocate首次系统性地将故障定位到具体智能体和最早失误步骤，对提升多智能体系统可靠性与可调试性具有重要实用价值。
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) based multi-agent systems enable complex problem solving through coordinated reasoning and action, but their distributed structure also introduces new challenges in diagnosing system-level failures. When an execution fails, identifying which agent is responsible and at what point the trajectory first becomes irreversibly misdirected is difficult due to long-horizon interactions and tightly coupled agent behaviors. In this paper, we study the problem of failure localization in LLM-based multi-agent systems and present AgentLocate, a framework that attributes failures to both a specific agent and the earliest decisive step. AgentLocate combines an LLM-based judging mechanism with multi-perspective verification by independent evaluators, whose assessments are aggregated using a confidence-aware strategy. The resulting feedback is further used to adapt the judge through lightweight fine-tuning, improving attribution quality. We evaluate AgentLocate on two complementary benchmarks covering diverse tasks, agent configurations, and trajectory lengths. Experimental results show that AgentLocate consistently outperforms existing failure localization methods in identifying both responsible agents and failure steps, while remaining efficient in terms of token usage and running time.

papers.title: A Quantum Reservoir Architecture for Chaotic Forecasting and a Test of Whether Its High Dimension Helps
papers.brief: 本文提出一套完整可复现的量子储层计算方案用于混沌系统预测，并设计了一种诊断方法，通过同步扩大预测问题规模与量子储层规模来验证高维特征空间是否真正贡献了预测能力。
papers.tldr: 量子储层计算用于混沌系统预测，并验证其高维特征空间是否真正有效
papers.what_it_is: 本文提出一套完整可复现的量子储层计算方案用于混沌系统预测，并设计了一种诊断方法，通过同步扩大预测问题规模与量子储层规模来验证高维特征空间是否真正贡献了预测能力。
key_points: 量子储层计算仅训练线性读出层，避免了量子机器学习中常见的优化问题，训练成本低
通过同步增大问题规模与储层规模并追踪读出稳定性指标，排除'容量膨胀'对性能的虚假贡献
在时空链和浅水流体模型两个混沌测试系统上，量子储层误差随规模增长保持平稳，而匹配的经典储层则不然
papers.why_notable: 首次提供了一套严格的诊断框架来区分量子储层的真实优势与高维假象，实验设计诚实（报告经典基线更强的情形），方法可推广至任意已知特征尺度的储层系统
papers.abstract: Quantum reservoir computing uses a fixed quantum circuit as a feature generator and trains only a simple linear readout on top of it. This makes it cheap to train and free of the optimisation problems that affect many quantum machine-learning models. A natural worry is that the very large feature space the circuit produces might inflate apparent performance without adding anything real. This paper provides two things. First, it gives a complete, reproducible recipe for one such reservoir applied to forecasting chaotic systems, including how data is fed in, how the circuit is built, and how the readout is trained. Second, it gives a way to tell whether the reservoir's high dimension is actually doing useful work. We grow the size of the prediction problem and the size of the quantum reservoir together, so that extra capacity cannot be the explanation for any improvement, and we track a single stability number that measures how well behaved the readout fit is. On two chaotic test systems, a spatiotemporal chain and a shallow-water fluid model, the quantum reservoir keeps a flat, stable error as both sizes grow, while a matched classical reservoir does not. We report where the classical baseline is in fact stronger, so the comparison is honest. The result is a clean specification plus a diagnostic that other groups can apply to any reservoir whose features have a known scale.

papers.title: When Implausible Tokens Get Reinforced: Tail-Aware Credit Calibration for LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.brief: 本文识别了无评论家RL方法中的"正向信用污染"问题——低概率尾部错误token与正常token获得相同正向奖励，导致错误推理被强化。为此提出TACO（尾部感知信用校准），通过计算尾部风险分数来校准token级别的信用分配，抑制对高风险token的不当正向更新。
papers.tldr: 提出TACO方法，通过尾部风险感知的信用校准抑制LLM强化学习中低概率错误token被错误强化的问题
papers.what_it_is: 本文识别了无评论家RL方法中的"正向信用污染"问题——低概率尾部错误token与正常token获得相同正向奖励，导致错误推理被强化。为此提出TACO（尾部感知信用校准），通过计算尾部风险分数来校准token级别的信用分配，抑制对高风险token的不当正向更新。
key_points: 发现"正向信用污染"失效模式：均匀信用分配使低概率错误token与正常token获得相同正向强化信号
TACO计算结合局部生成上下文的尾部风险分数，区分"意外稀有"与"探索驱动的不确定性"
在3个LLM、8个基准测试上持续优于GRPO基线，并提升训练稳定性，支持长期RL的持续性能增益
papers.why_notable: 针对当前主流GRPO等无评论家RL方法的固有缺陷提出精准解决方案，在不完全移除梯度的前提下实现细粒度token级信用校准，兼顾稀有有用模式的积累与噪声抑制，对提升LLM推理训练质量具有实际价值
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved remarkable success in enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, widely used critic-free RL methods rely on uniform credit assignment, broadcasting the same advantage to all tokens regardless of their differences. We identify a critical failure mode of this design, which we refer to as Positive-Credit Contamination: low-probability tail tokens that are contextually erroneous receive identical positive credit to plausible ones within the same trajectory, resulting in the indiscriminate reinforcement of flawed reasoning behavior. To mitigate this issue, we propose Tail-Aware Credit calibratiOn (TACO), a method that calibrates uniform credit assignment to suppress undesirable positive updates. TACO first computes a tail-risk score that incorporates the local generation context to assess each token's risk of falling into the unreliable tail, distinguishing unexpected rarity from uncertainty-driven exploration. TACO then uses this score to tune positive credit for risky tokens without removing their gradients entirely, so that recurring useful rare patterns can accumulate reinforcement while incidental noise is progressively dampened. Experimental results across three LLMs and eight benchmarks show that TACO consistently outperforms GRPO-style baselines. Notably, TACO improves training stability, supporting sustained performance gains in long-horizon RL. The source code is available at: https://github.com/xiuyilou/TACO.

papers.title: Expressivity and Statistical Trade-offs in Diffusion Policy Learning
papers.brief: 本文从理论上分析扩散策略的表达能力与统计学习之间的权衡，以漂移函数的Lipschitz常数K为核心量，建立近似误差与有限样本性能界的精确刻画。
papers.tldr: 揭示扩散策略中Lipschitz预算K如何权衡表达能力与统计复杂度
papers.what_it_is: 本文从理论上分析扩散策略的表达能力与统计学习之间的权衡，以漂移函数的Lipschitz常数K为核心量，建立近似误差与有限样本性能界的精确刻画。
key_points: K-Lipschitz漂移的扩散策略可将值近似误差压缩至O(1/K)，并证明了匹配下界
神经网络参数化时，增大K提升近似能力但增加统计复杂度，平衡后得到有限样本性能差距O(n^{-2/(m+6)})，耗散漂移类可改善至O(n^{-2/(m+4)})
提出实践原则：根据样本量选择扩散预算K，再据此选择对应Lipschitz系数的神经网络架构
papers.why_notable: 首次从数学上严格解释扩散策略强表达能力的来源，并给出可操作的样本量-架构选择指导，填补了扩散策略理论理解的空白。
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based policies have recently emerged as powerful policy parameterizations for reinforcement learning, representing state-conditioned action distributions as terminal laws of diffusion processes with parameterized drifts. This terminal-law representation has shown substantial expressive flexibility in practice, enabling diffusion policies to model complex, multimodal, and highly non-Gaussian action distributions; however, it remains unclear what mathematically drives this expressivity and how to fully exploit it when the policy is learned from finite data. In this paper, we identify the drift Lipschitz budget $K$ as a central quantity governing the expressivity and statistical behavior of diffusion policies. We quantify expressivity through approximation: diffusion policies with $K$-Lipschitz drifts can concentrate near optimal deterministic policies and achieve value approximation error of order $1/K$; moreover, we prove a matching lower bound under nondegenerate diffusion noise. This increased expressivity comes with a statistical cost. When the drift is parameterized by neural networks, increasing $K$ improves approximation but increases statistical complexity. Balancing these two terms yields a finite-sample performance gap of order $\tilde{O}(n^{-2/(m+6)})$ for generic neural-network drifts, and a sharper rate $\tilde{O}(n^{-2/(m+4)})$ for one-sided dissipative drift classes, where $n$ is the sample size and $m$ is the dimension of the state space. Numerical experiments provide empirical evidence for the sample-dependent trade-off in $K$, supporting both theoretical regimes. Our framework also suggests a practical implementation principle: choose the diffusion budget $K$ according to the available sample size, and then select a neural-network architecture with the corresponding fixed Lipschitz coefficient.

papers.title: Evaluating the Generalizability of Foundation Models for Extreme Environmental Events: Case Study of California Wildfire PM2.5
papers.brief: 首个系统性基准测试，比较六种时序基础模型（零样本及LoRA微调）与传统深度学习模型在12年加州野火PM2.5数据上的极端事件预测能力，采用留一事件交叉验证协议评估泛化性。
papers.tldr: 基础时序模型在加州野火PM2.5极端事件预测中不及传统BiLSTM，LoRA微调可改善但仍有差距
papers.what_it_is: 首个系统性基准测试，比较六种时序基础模型（零样本及LoRA微调）与传统深度学习模型在12年加州野火PM2.5数据上的极端事件预测能力，采用留一事件交叉验证协议评估泛化性。
key_points: BiLSTM表现最优：MAE仅5.16 μg/m³，危险级别（>225.5 μg/m³）F1达0.63，优于所有基础模型（最高0.54）
零样本Chronos-2存在严重尾部不稳定性：RMSE高达23.4 μg/m³，R²为负值，偶发大误差导致性能崩溃
LoRA微调显著修复了基础模型的不稳定性，但仍无法超越有监督训练的循环神经网络基线
papers.why_notable: 挑战了"大型预训练模型在所有任务上普遍优越"的假设，为极端环境事件预测提供了实用部署指导，揭示了时序基础模型在分布外极端值场景下的根本局限性。
papers.abstract: Wildfire smoke events produce extreme PM$_{2.5}$ concentrations that pose severe public health risks, yet forecasting rare, hazardous-level spikes remains a fundamental challenge. Time series foundation models (TSFMs), pretrained models offering zero-shot inference and efficient adaptation, perform strongly on general benchmarks, but their behavior under extreme out-of-distribution conditions is poorly understood. We present the first systematic benchmark comparing six TSFM configurations (zero-shot TimesFM, Chronos-2, Moirai-2, and Time-MoE, plus LoRA fine-tuned Chronos-2 and Time-MoE) against fully-trained baselines (LSTM, BiLSTM, Transformer) and naive persistence on a 12-year (2013--2025) hourly PM$_{2.5}$ dataset covering 1,375 wildfire incidents across 79 California monitoring sites. A leave-one-incident-out (LOIO) protocol evaluates generalization to unseen fires, using MAE, RMSE, and exceedance F1 at EPA AQI thresholds across 6-, 12-, and 24-hour horizons. Results reveal a consistent hierarchy. The BiLSTM achieves the lowest MAE ($5.16\,μg/m^3$) and the highest exceedance F1 at every threshold, including the Hazardous band ($>225.5\,μg/m^3$), reaching 0.63 versus at most 0.54 for any foundation model. Zero-shot TSFMs improve on persistence only modestly, and zero-shot Chronos-2 exhibits severe RMSE tail instability ($23.4\,μg/m^3$, negative $R^2$) from sporadic large errors. LoRA fine-tuning substantially improves both adapted families and largely repairs this instability, yet no foundation model surpasses the trained recurrent baselines on any metric. These findings challenge the assumption that larger pretrained models universally dominate environmental forecasting and provide actionable deployment guidance for wildfire air quality prediction.

papers.title: Persona Cartography: Charting Language Model Personality Traits in Weight Space
papers.brief: 提出"人格制图"方法，将LLM的行为模式（人格）映射为权重空间中的位置，训练低秩适配器（LoRA）来放大或抑制OCEAN五大人格维度（开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性、神经质），实现对模型人格的精确控制与组合。
papers.tldr: 用OCEAN人格框架在权重空间中分解、测量和控制大语言模型的人格特质
papers.what_it_is: 提出"人格制图"方法，将LLM的行为模式（人格）映射为权重空间中的位置，训练低秩适配器（LoRA）来放大或抑制OCEAN五大人格维度（开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性、神经质），实现对模型人格的精确控制与组合。
key_points: 跨6个模型（4B-32B，三个模型家族）验证：单一人格适配器对目标特质呈单调影响，多适配器近似可加性组合，构建混合人格
人格轴与安全相关行为直接挂钩：神经质轴影响模型挫败感表达，宜人性轴影响谄媚（sycophancy）程度
引入无监督心理测量流程，从模型输出中自动恢复四个可解释行为因子：语气、主动性、说教性、认知谨慎性
papers.why_notable: 首次将心理学人格测量（OCEAN）与模型权重编辑系统性结合，为LLM安全对齐提供可量化、可组合的人格控制工具，对模型行为可解释性和安全研究具有重要实用价值
papers.abstract: Large language models exhibit recurring behavioural patterns -- personas -- that shape generalisation and safety, but we lack reliable tools for decomposing, measuring, and controlling them. Our central insight is to treat personas as positions in a space of behavioural traits, using the OCEAN framework to describe model personas in terms of Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism. We train low-rank adapters to amplify or suppress individual traits, and evaluate their effects using an LLM-judge calibrated against a human-validated panel, trait-specific multiple-choice benchmarks, and standard capability evaluations. Across six models from three families (4B-32B), we find that each adapter moves its target trait largely monotonically with scale, combines approximately additively with other adapters to construct mixed personas, and preserves performance on capability benchmarks at moderate scales. We further show that the induced trait axes affect safety-relevant behaviour in downstream evaluations: for example, moving along neuroticism and agreeableness axes affects frustration and sycophancy respectively. We also introduce an unsupervised psychometric pipeline that recovers four interpretable behavioural factors (tone, initiative, didacticism, epistemic caution) from model rollouts. Persona control can then be considered in terms of learning, scaling, and composing traits in weight space, providing a bridge between personality measurement, model editing, and safety.

papers.title: Multimodal Unlearning Across Vision, Language, Video, and Audio: Survey of Methods, Datasets, and Benchmarks
papers.brief: 本文对多模态基础模型（VLM、DM、LLM、AFM）中的机器遗忘技术进行全面综述，提出统一分类体系，覆盖视觉、语言、音频、视频四大模态，系统比较各类选择性遗忘方法的优劣权衡。
papers.tldr: 首个跨视觉、语言、视频、音频的多模态机器遗忘综述，系统梳理方法、数据集与基准
papers.what_it_is: 本文对多模态基础模型（VLM、DM、LLM、AFM）中的机器遗忘技术进行全面综述，提出统一分类体系，覆盖视觉、语言、音频、视频四大模态，系统比较各类选择性遗忘方法的优劣权衡。
key_points: 提出跨模态遗忘的统一分类框架，涵盖删除强度、保留效用、效率、可逆性与鲁棒性等多维度权衡
梳理多模态基础模型中敏感/版权/偏见/不安全跨模态关联的遗忘挑战，指出知识分布于共享表示导致定向遗忘困难
整理并开源相关数据集、基准及论文仓库，归纳当前开放问题与实际部署考量
papers.why_notable: 随着多模态大模型广泛部署，数据删除请求与合规需求日益迫切，机器遗忘是避免重训练的关键技术路径；本综述填补了跨模态遗忘系统性研究的空白，为该领域提供重要参考框架。
papers.abstract: With the growing adoption of VLMs, DMs, LLMs, and AFMs, these multimodal foundation models can inadvertently encode sensitive, copyrighted, biased, or unsafe cross-modal associations that originate from their training data. Retraining after deletion requests or policy updates is often impractical, and targeted forgetting remains difficult because knowledge is distributed across shared representations. Multimodal unlearning addresses this challenge by enabling selective removal across modalities while retaining overall utility. This survey offers a unified, system-oriented view of multimodal unlearning across vision, language, audio, and video, grounded in recent advances, emerging applications, and open problems. Our taxonomy enables systematic comparison across model architectures and modalities, clarifying trade-offs among deletion strength, retention, efficiency, reversibility, and robustness. This survey highlights open problems and practical considerations to support future research and deployment of multimodal unlearning. We release a curated repository: https://smsnobin77.github.io/Awesome-Multimodal-Unlearning/

papers.title: Functional and Secure Code Generation with Task Vectors
papers.brief: 提出SecVecCoder方法，通过对LLM权重进行任务向量线性运算，在不修改解码流程的前提下，同时提升代码的功能性与安全性。
papers.tldr: 利用任务向量算术让LLM同时生成功能正确且无安全漏洞的代码
papers.what_it_is: 提出SecVecCoder方法，通过对LLM权重进行任务向量线性运算，在不修改解码流程的前提下，同时提升代码的功能性与安全性。
key_points: 在CodeGuard+基准上测试6个代码LLM，可信代码生成率提升2.1-36.0个百分点
对未见过的CWE漏洞类型泛化能力强，提升幅度最高达39.1个百分点
仅修改模型权重，无需特殊解码策略，推理延迟仅增加0.6%
papers.why_notable: 首次将任务向量对齐技术引入安全代码生成领域，同时兼顾功能性与安全性，计算开销极低且具备跨CWE类型的泛化能力，实用价值显著。
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code generation, but they struggle to generate functional code free of security vulnerabilities. Prior work to improve the secure code generation abilities of such coding LLMs has largely focused on evaluating code functionality and security separately using different datasets, or focused on finding vulnerabilities post-generation. At the same time, the text-generation domain has seen significant work on alignment techniques, where models are tuned such that their outputs exhibit certain qualities (e.g., helpfulness, harmlessness). Of particular interest is task-vector arithmetic, where linear operations on LLM weights can be used to arbitrarily enhance alignment while incurring only minimal computational overhead. We develop a novel method, SecVecCoder, leveraging task vectors to produce trustworthy code that is simultaneously functional and secure without the need for post-generation adjustment. Across six coding LLMs from three families on the CodeGuard+ benchmark, SecVecCoder improves the rate of trustworthy code completions by 2.1-36.0 percentage points over the base model, with improvements on unseen CWE types reaching up to 39.1 percentage points. Since the effectiveness of the coding LLM relies only on changing the model weights, SecVecCoder requires no method-specific decoding and hence achieves a decoding latency within 0.6% of the base model's, on average.

papers.title: FedTR: Federated Learning Framework with Transfer Learning for Industrial Visual Inspection
papers.brief: 提出FedTR框架，将迁移学习与联邦学习结合，先用公开数据集预训练模型，再在分布式私有数据上进行联邦微调，专注于工业视觉检测中的端到端文本识别任务。
papers.tldr: FedTR将迁移学习与联邦学习结合，用于工业视觉检测中的标签缺陷识别
papers.what_it_is: 提出FedTR框架，将迁移学习与联邦学习结合，先用公开数据集预训练模型，再在分布式私有数据上进行联邦微调，专注于工业视觉检测中的端到端文本识别任务。
key_points: 先在公开数据集上预训练，再通过联邦学习在分布式私有数据上微调，解决工业场景数据稀缺问题
在同构数据上端到端文字识别词级准确率达95.5%，异构数据上达94.2%
性能接近集中式训练水平，同时保护各参与方的数据隐私
papers.why_notable: 将迁移学习引入联邦学习框架有效缓解了工业场景中数据量少、任务复杂的双重挑战，为隐私保护下的工业视觉检测提供了实用解决方案。
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a collaborative learning scheme to train deep learning models, where collaborating parties can consolidate their models without sharing local data with other parties, hence preserving data privacy. Nevertheless, when implementing FL in Industrial visual inspection (IVI), the constraints posed by limited data availability and the intricate nature of the inspection tasks significantly impact the performance of the resulting model. This paper introduces FedTR, a novel FL framework incorporating transfer learning designed for Autonomous IVI, focusing on the challenging task of identifying label defects through end-to-end text recognition. Transfer learning is a method that leverages the knowledge of a pre-trained model to adapt to a different dataset. FedTR initially trains the model using a publicly available dataset, after which performs the essential federated learning process with model fine-tuning on the distributed and limited private data. Extensive experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness and feasibility of FedTR on private ink cartridge datasets for label defect identification. FedTR achieves an end-to-end text recognition word-level accuracy of 95.5% and 94.2% on homogeneous and heterogeneous data respectively. Additionally, it attains performance levels that are on par with those achieved through centralized training.

papers.title: Collate: Collaborative Neural Network Learning for Latency-Critical Edge Systems
papers.brief: 提出Collate训练框架，在联邦学习中引入动态零化-恢复方法调整本地模型架构，并设计原型校正聚合方案，使异构边缘设备在满足各自延迟约束的同时通过单次训练过程获得高精度模型。
papers.tldr: Collate框架通过协作学习异构模型，同时满足多边缘系统的延迟约束并提升推理精度
papers.what_it_is: 提出Collate训练框架，在联邦学习中引入动态零化-恢复方法调整本地模型架构，并设计原型校正聚合方案，使异构边缘设备在满足各自延迟约束的同时通过单次训练过程获得高精度模型。
key_points: 动态零化-恢复（zeroizing-recovering）方法：自适应调整每个本地模型架构以在延迟约束下保持高精度
原型校正联邦聚合方案：将异构本地模型聚合为满足不同系统延迟约束的模型，仅需一次训练
实验结果：扩展模型平均精度提升1.96%，压缩模型平均精度提升3.09%，几乎无额外训练开销
papers.why_notable: 现有FL优化主要关注训练效率而忽视推理延迟，Collate首次系统性地将延迟约束纳入联邦学习训练框架，对实时边缘系统部署具有重要实用价值。
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) empowers multiple clients to collaboratively learn a model, enlarging the training data of each client for high accuracy while protecting data privacy. However, when deploying FL in real-time edge systems, the heterogeneity of devices among systems has a severe impact on the performance of the inferred model. Existing optimizations on FL focus on improving the training efficiency but fail to speed up inference, especially when there is a latency constraint. In this work, we propose Collate, a novel training framework that collaboratively learns heterogeneous models to meet the latency constraints of multiple edge systems simultaneously. We design a dynamic zeroizing-recovering method to adjust each local model architecture for high accuracy under its latency constraint. A proto-corrected federated aggregation scheme is also introduced to aggregate all heterogeneous local models, satisfying the latency constraint of different systems with only one training process and maintaining high accuracy. Extensive experiments indicate that, compared to state-of-the-art methods and under a latency constraint, our extended models can improve the accuracy by 1.96% on average, and our shrunk models can also obtain a 3.09% accuracy improvement on average, with almost no extra training overhead. The related codes and data will be available at https://github.com/ntuliuteam/Collate

papers.title: Unit-Independent Low-Rate Wrist GSR Processing for Stress Detection Using Phasic nSCR Features
papers.brief: 本文提出一种单位无关的低采样率腕部GSR信号处理流程，通过提取每分钟皮肤电反应次数（nSCR/min）作为压力特征，解决腕部GSR幅值与掌部实验室测量差异大的问题。
papers.tldr: 提出单位无关的低采样率腕部皮肤电反应处理流程，用于可穿戴压力检测
papers.what_it_is: 本文提出一种单位无关的低采样率腕部GSR信号处理流程，通过提取每分钟皮肤电反应次数（nSCR/min）作为压力特征，解决腕部GSR幅值与掌部实验室测量差异大的问题。
key_points: 采集31名参与者腕部与掌部配对GSR数据，涵盖坐姿/站姿基线、中性演讲及TSST社会压力测试四种场景
流程包括信号清洗、SCL/SCR分解、鲁棒z-score归一化及相位SCR峰值检测，输出nSCR/min特征
随机森林分类器在25Hz腕部GSR上对TSST与坐/站基线的二分类平衡准确率分别达0.823和0.871，与100Hz特征性能相当
papers.why_notable: 实现了低采样率（25Hz）下单位无关的腕部GSR压力检测，降低了对硬件精度的依赖，推动可穿戴设备在真实场景中的实用化部署。
papers.abstract: Galvanic skin response (GSR) is widely used for stress detection, but wrist-based GSR remains challenging because its absolute amplitude can differ substantially from laboratory-grade palmar measurements. In this paper, we propose a unit-independent low-rate wrist GSR processing pipeline to extract the number of skin conductance responses per minute (nSCR/min) as a stress-related feature. We collect paired wrist and palmar GSR recordings from 31 participants during sitting baseline, standing baseline, neutral speaking, and the Trier Social Stress Test (TSST), a laboratory social stressor task. The proposed pipeline cleans the raw GSR signal, decomposes it into tonic skin conductance level (SCL) and phasic skin conductance response (SCR), applies robust z-score normalization, and detects phasic SCR peaks to compute nSCR/min. Using random forest on 25Hz We-Be GSR, nSCR/min achieved balanced accuracies of 0.823 and 0.871 for binary classification between TSST and the sitting and standing baselines, respectively. Moreover, the 25Hz We-Be GSR features achieved comparable balanced accuracy to the original 100Hz features across the evaluated tasks. These results suggest the feasibility of low-rate, unit-independent wrist GSR processing for wearable stress detection.

papers.title: SpO$_2$ Predictor-Guided Stage-Wise Time-Frequency Reconstruction of Low-Quality Dual-Wavelength PPG for Oxygen Saturation Estimation
papers.brief: 本文提出一种SpO₂预测器引导的分阶段时频重建框架，用于从低质量红光/红外双波长PPG信号中准确估计血氧饱和度。该方法结合时域波形损失、STFT频域损失及预训练SpO₂预测器约束，通过四阶段训练优化重建质量。
papers.tldr: 提出SpO₂预测器引导的分阶段时频重建框架，提升低质量双波长PPG血氧估计精度
papers.what_it_is: 本文提出一种SpO₂预测器引导的分阶段时频重建框架，用于从低质量红光/红外双波长PPG信号中准确估计血氧饱和度。该方法结合时域波形损失、STFT频域损失及预训练SpO₂预测器约束，通过四阶段训练优化重建质量。
key_points: 联合时域波形损失与短时傅里叶变换（STFT）频域损失进行PPG重建，保留频率结构信息
引入预训练SpO₂预测器作为生理约束，使重建信号保留血氧相关信息而非仅最小化波形误差
在公开OpenOximetry数据集上MAE达2.882%，私有可穿戴数据集上达2.359%，均为最优
papers.why_notable: 首次将SpO₂预测器作为生理语义约束引入PPG重建任务，突破传统方法仅优化波形保真度的局限，对可穿戴健康监测中低质量信号处理具有重要实用价值。
papers.abstract: Continuous oxygen saturation (SpO$_2$) estimation from wearable photoplethysmography (PPG) is important for long-term health monitoring, but low-quality red and infrared PPG segments can distort waveform morphology and degrade SpO$_2$ prediction accuracy. Existing PPG denoising and reconstruction methods usually optimize waveform fidelity or heart rate characteristics, while time-domain waveform loss on PPG signals alone insufficiently preserves frequency structure and SpO$_2$-relevant information. This paper proposes a SpO$_2$ predictor-guided stage-wise time-frequency reconstruction framework for low-quality dual-wavelength PPG signals. The proposed method first selects high-quality PPG segments to pretrain a SpO$_2$ predictor. A masked reconstruction model is then trained to recover randomly masked PPG regions using a joint reconstruction objective that combines time-domain waveform loss with frequency-domain loss computed from the short-time Fourier transform (STFT). To make the reconstruction task physiologically relevant, the pretrained SpO$_2$ predictor is incorporated as an additional constraint, encouraging the reconstructed PPG to preserve SpO$_2$ information rather than only minimizing waveform reconstruction error. The SpO$_2$ predictor and PPG reconstructor model are optimized through four training stages. Experiments on the public OpenOximetry Repository and a private wearable PPG dataset show that the proposed approach achieves the lowest subject-level MAE, with 2.882\% on the public dataset and 2.359\% on the private dataset.

papers.title: Evaluating the Effect of Frame Rate in Sequence-Based Classification of Autism-Related Self-Stimulatory Hand Idiosyncrasies
papers.brief: 本文针对自闭症相关自我刺激行为的视频自动检测，系统评估了序列神经网络架构（LSTM/GRU）在不同帧率采样下的分类性能，并对小样本行为数据集的数据增强策略进行了消融研究。
papers.tldr: 用LSTM/GRU对自闭症刻板手部行为视频分类，GRU达98.75%准确率
papers.what_it_is: 本文针对自闭症相关自我刺激行为的视频自动检测，系统评估了序列神经网络架构（LSTM/GRU）在不同帧率采样下的分类性能，并对小样本行为数据集的数据增强策略进行了消融研究。
key_points: LSTM和GRU在每15帧采样间隔下分别达到97.5%和98.75%准确率，显著超越CNN基线（62-76%）
10种数据增强策略中，水平翻转单独使用准确率最高（48.78%），去除上采样导致最大性能下降，证明其不可或缺
个性化模型（per-subject）在时间分割测试上表现稳定（平均损失1.84，SD 0.79），适合临床小数据场景
papers.why_notable: 为临床数据稀缺场景下的视频行为分类提供了具体可操作的架构选择、采样率和数据增强指导，对自闭症远程筛查的规模化落地具有实用价值。
papers.abstract: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) affects over 75 million individuals worldwide, yet scalable computational methods for remote behavioral screening remain limited. This study addresses two complementary challenges in automated detection of autism-related self-stimulatory behaviors from video: (1) identifying the optimal sequence-based neural network architecture and temporal sampling rate, and (2) characterizing data augmentation strategies for training on small behavioral datasets. For the first objective, long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) models were trained on pose-derived features from the Self-Stimulatory Behavior Diagnosis (SSBD) dataset at frame sampling intervals of 1, 5, 15, 30, 45, and 90 frames. Both architectures exceeded prior convolutional neural network (CNN) baselines (62-76% accuracy), with peak accuracies of 97.5% (LSTM) and 98.75% (GRU) at a sampling interval of every 15 frames. For the second objective, ten data augmentation strategies were applied to an I3D transfer learning pipeline, with an ablation study quantifying the marginal contribution of each technique. Horizontal flip achieved the highest standalone accuracy (48.78%), while exclusion of upsampling from the augmentation pipeline produced the largest performance degradation, indicating its necessity for complex behavioral video augmentation. A personalized machine learning approach, in which per-subject models were trained and tested on temporally split segments of each video, produced consistent predictions (mean loss 1.84, SD 0.79). These results provide practitioners with concrete guidance on architecture selection, sampling rate, and augmentation strategy for video-based behavioral classification in data-scarce clinical domains.

papers.title: Linear Attention Architectures: Mechanisms, Trade-offs, and Cross-Layer Routing
papers.brief: 本文对softmax注意力与四种循环线性注意力架构（DeltaNet、Gated DeltaNet、Kimi Delta Attention、Gated DeltaNet-2）进行统一符号框架下的对比研究，并提出跨层值路由（CLVR）机制以改善模型性能。
papers.tldr: 系统比较四种线性注意力架构并提出跨层路由机制CLVR
papers.what_it_is: 本文对softmax注意力与四种循环线性注意力架构（DeltaNet、Gated DeltaNet、Kimi Delta Attention、Gated DeltaNet-2）进行统一符号框架下的对比研究，并提出跨层值路由（CLVR）机制以改善模型性能。
key_points: 在350M参数/15B token规模下系统评估四种线性注意力架构，Kimi Delta Attention配合Muon优化器达到最低验证损失
纯Gated DeltaNet栈使用AdamW训练吞吐量最高，混合栈以吞吐量为代价换取更低损失；Muon优化器在匹配架构下一致优于AdamW
提出跨层值路由（CLVR）机制，将写入值前向传递至下一层，对DeltaNet和Gated DeltaNet均带来验证损失的小幅改善
papers.why_notable: 首次在统一框架下系统比较多种主流线性注意力架构的表达能力、内存衰减、训练吞吐等维度，并提出CLVR这一轻量级跨层路由改进，为长序列高效建模提供实践参考。
papers.abstract: Self-attention lets each token retrieve information from the full context, but its quadratic cost in sequence length limits training and inference at long context. This paper presents a comparative study of softmax attention and four recent recurrent linear-attention architectures: DeltaNet, Gated DeltaNet, Kimi Delta Attention, and Gated DeltaNet-2. We express these mechanisms in a common recurrent-memory notation, making explicit how they differ in expressivity, memory decay, erase and write control, training throughput, and implementation complexity. Our experiments center on 350M-parameter models trained for 15B tokens, and include optimizer and learning-rate comparisons, hybrid-versus-pure stack comparisons, sequence-length runtime measurements, larger DeltaNet runs at 1.3B and 3B parameters, and a small set of downstream evaluations. The reported speed results measure training throughput and iteration time; we do not provide an empirical inference-speed benchmark. Within the reported 350M-parameter, 15B-token sweep, Kimi Delta Attention with Muon reaches the lowest final validation loss, a pure Gated DeltaNet stack trained with AdamW has the highest normalized training throughput, hybrid stacks generally improve loss at a throughput cost, and Muon consistently lowers final validation loss relative to AdamW in the matched architecture settings we evaluate. We introduce and evaluate lightweight cross-layer routing mechanisms for DeltaNet-style memories. The most natural DeltaNet-inspired formulation, forwarding a lower layer's delta-rule write error into the next layer's value target, does not improve over matched baselines. Routing into the aligned hidden stream and forwarding the write value instead yields a modest improvement in the matched runs we report: Cross-Layer Value Routing (CLVR) lowers final validation loss for both DeltaNet and Gated DeltaNet.

papers.title: path_boost: A Python Package for Interpretable Graph-Level Prediction using Path-Based Gradient Boosting
papers.brief: 提出PathBoost算法及同名Python包，通过在梯度提升过程中自动发现图中预测性路径，构建基于路径特征的加法预测模型，实现可解释的图级监督学习。
papers.tldr: PathBoost：基于路径梯度提升的可解释图级预测Python包
papers.what_it_is: 提出PathBoost算法及同名Python包，通过在梯度提升过程中自动发现图中预测性路径，构建基于路径特征的加法预测模型，实现可解释的图级监督学习。
key_points: 算法迭代选择并扩展路径，避免穷举所有可能路径，利用Boosting将弱学习器组合为强集成模型
支持回归与二分类任务，兼容scikit-learn工作流，支持自定义基学习器、并行训练及变量重要性计算
在过渡金属化合物分子性质预测任务上验证，并在六个分子数据集上与GNN和图核方法进行基准对比
papers.why_notable: 相比图神经网络难以解释的黑盒特性，PathBoost提供明确的路径级可解释性，同时保持竞争性预测性能，已开源发布于PyPI和GitHub，具有较强实用价值。
papers.abstract: We present path_boost, a Python package for interpretable supervised learning on graph-structured input data. The package implements PathBoost, a gradient boosting algorithm that automatically discovers predictive labeled paths within graphs during the learning process. Unlike graph neural networks, which are generally difficult to interpret, PathBoost produces an additive prediction model over path-based features that explicitly reveals which substructures drive predictions. To avoid an exhaustive enumeration of all possible paths, the algorithm iteratively selects and extends paths during learning based on their predictive power, using boosting to combine weak learners into a strong ensemble. The package supports both regression and binary classification. Key features include compatibility with scikit-learn workflows, support for custom base learners and selectors, automatic starting node selection, parallel training across anchor nodes, and built-in variable importance computation. We demonstrate PathBoost on molecular property prediction of transition metal compounds, where atoms serve as nodes and bonds as edges, and further benchmark PathBoost against an established graph neural network and a graph kernel method across six molecular datasets. The package is available on PyPI and GitHub under an open-source license.

papers.title: Distributed Sketching on Data Partitions for OLS Regression
papers.brief: 提出在分区数据子集上分别进行草图压缩、独立构建OLS估计量后取平均的分布式方案，并在固定设计设定下精确刻画了平均OLS估计量的超额损失。
papers.tldr: 研究分布式草图法在分区数据上的OLS回归，证明其损失与全局草图法相当
papers.what_it_is: 提出在分区数据子集上分别进行草图压缩、独立构建OLS估计量后取平均的分布式方案，并在固定设计设定下精确刻画了平均OLS估计量的超额损失。
key_points: 将大规模数据集分区后在各子集上独立做草图压缩，进一步降低计算成本
精确推导了平均OLS估计量的超额损失表达式
当各子集协方差矩阵差异较小时，分区草图法的损失与全局草图法相当
papers.why_notable: 为分布式机器学习中的草图压缩提供了严格的理论保证，填补了分区数据场景下的理论空白，对大规模分布式线性回归具有实际指导意义。
papers.abstract: This paper studies distributed sketching for ordinary least squares (OLS) regression, an approach that distributes small sketches of a large data set over multiple machines to separately construct OLS estimators and average them. Unlike prior studies that consider sketching on the whole data set, we consider sketching on partitioned subsets to further reduce computational cost. Under the fixed design setting, we characterize the exact excess loss of the averaged OLS estimator. Results show that this loss is comparable to the established loss for sketching on the whole data set when the divergence among subset covariances is small.

papers.title: Optimal Learning Rate Scaling Depends on Data in Deep Scalar Linear Networks
papers.brief: 本文研究深度标量线性网络的梯度下降动力学，证明最优的逐层学习率缩放规则依赖于数据分布，而非仅由网络深度决定；在数据依赖的最优缩放下，收敛速率对深度（包括无穷深度）保持常数级线性收敛。
papers.tldr: 深度标量线性网络中，最优学习率缩放依赖数据，与深度无关的缩放规则无法跨深度迁移
papers.what_it_is: 本文研究深度标量线性网络的梯度下降动力学，证明最优的逐层学习率缩放规则依赖于数据分布，而非仅由网络深度决定；在数据依赖的最优缩放下，收敛速率对深度（包括无穷深度）保持常数级线性收敛。
key_points: 深度标量线性网络 f(x)=∏w_l·x 存在任意整数深度的精确时间解析解
数据无关的缩放规则（如μP等）无法跨深度迁移，最优学习率缩放必须依赖数据
在数据依赖的最优缩放下，学习动力学与数据无关、对深度弱依赖，所有深度（含无穷）均实现常数线性收敛；残差连接网络中也观察到类似数据依赖效应
papers.why_notable: 对当前流行的数据无关学习率缩放规则（如μP）提出理论挑战，揭示即使在最简单的线性模型中数据依赖性也不可忽视，对深度网络超参数迁移研究具有重要理论意义
papers.abstract: In this short note we consider the gradient descent dynamics of deep scalar linear networks, $f(x) = \prod_{l=1}^L w_l x$, which enjoy exact time-course solutions for any integer depth. We show that even in this minimal model, the optimal depth-wise learning rate scaling depends on data, whereas data-agnostic scaling rules fail to transfer across depths. Under the data-dependent optimal scaling, the learning dynamics is independent of data and weakly dependent on depth, resulting in a constant linear convergence rate across all depths including infinity. We further show similar data-dependent effects in deep scalar linear networks with residual connections.

papers.title: Physics-Informed Machine Learning Under Small-Data Constraints: Lessons from Abrasive Waterjet Milling
papers.brief: 本文以155个样本的Inconel 718磨料水射流铣削数据集为案例，系统研究了小数据场景下物理信息机器学习的方法论问题，提出数据清洗与统计筛选分离、鲁棒评估及物理集成方式选择三项方法论贡献。
papers.tldr: 小数据约束下物理信息机器学习的方法论研究，以磨料水射流铣削为案例
papers.what_it_is: 本文以155个样本的Inconel 718磨料水射流铣削数据集为案例，系统研究了小数据场景下物理信息机器学习的方法论问题，提出数据清洗与统计筛选分离、鲁棒评估及物理集成方式选择三项方法论贡献。
key_points: 单次划分测试集（15点）的模型排名极不稳定：排名第1的模型在10折交叉验证下跌至第7，高斯过程（GP）变体占据前列
残差学习结合紧凑物理基线对GP有效（方差更低、可解释性更强），但会降低树模型性能；贝叶斯超参调优在小样本多阶段混合管道中反而有害
GP不确定性区间近似校准（名义90%置信区间的实际覆盖率为86%），物理数据清洗与统计筛选应作为独立建模假设显式处理
papers.why_notable: 针对工业小数据场景（昂贵、材料特定）提供了系统性方法论指导，揭示了常见评估陷阱（单次划分不稳定性），对制造业AI应用具有直接实践价值
papers.abstract: In physically dominated machining processes, experimental datasets are small, expensive, and material-specific; in this regime, data curation, evaluation design, and the form of physics integration can matter as much as the learning algorithm. Using an abrasive waterjet milling dataset ($n{=}155$, Inconel\,718), we make three methodological contributions. First, we separate physics-based data \emph{cleaning} from statistical \emph{curation} and treat the latter as competing modelling hypotheses rather than silent preprocessing. Second, we find that model rankings from a 15-point hold-out set can be unstable: the single-split winner drops from rank~1 to rank~7 under 10-fold cross-validation, while Gaussian Process (GP) variants occupy the top ranks. Third, we study a spectrum of physics integration levels and find that residual learning on a compact physics baseline is competitive for GP, yielding lower variance and an interpretable decomposition, but degrades tree-based models. Bayesian hyper parameter tuning improves parameter-sensitive baselines such as gradient boosting and SVR, yet harms multi-stage hybrid pipelines at this sample size. GP uncertainty intervals are approximately calibrated ($86\%$ empirical coverage at nominal $90\%$). The resulting picture is methodological: for small, expensive process datasets, our results suggest that, in this setting, reliable model comparison benefits from explicit curation hypotheses, robust evaluation, and careful choices about how physics enters the model.

papers.title: CTA-Pipelining: A Latency-Oriented Spatial Scaling Method for Multi-GPU Systems
papers.brief: 提出CTA-pipelining执行范式，利用共享内存多GPU系统的紧耦合互联特性，在CTA（协作线程数组）级别挖掘依赖关系，实现跨GPU的相关内核并发执行，专为LLM低延迟推理场景设计。
papers.tldr: CTA流水线：面向延迟优化的多GPU空间扩展新范式，最高降低31.8%推理延迟
papers.what_it_is: 提出CTA-pipelining执行范式，利用共享内存多GPU系统的紧耦合互联特性，在CTA（协作线程数组）级别挖掘依赖关系，实现跨GPU的相关内核并发执行，专为LLM低延迟推理场景设计。
key_points: 在CTA级别建立跨GPU依赖关系，允许相邻层的计算在不同GPU上流水线并发执行，而非等待前层全部完成
在8-GPU H200和B200系统上验证：2层GEMM（MLP操作）延迟比micro-batching降低31.8%，比张量并行（TP）降低29.6%
与张量并行正交，可组合使用进一步压缩延迟边界，支持CUTLASS、cuBLAS、NCCL等主流库
papers.why_notable: 当前多GPU软件栈将高速互联仅视为网络而非共享内存，本文首次系统性地将紧耦合多GPU架构的硬件特性转化为延迟优化手段，填补了TP之外延迟导向扩展方法的空白，对LLM在线推理服务具有直接实用价值。
papers.abstract: The evolution of compute infrastructure has transformed multi-GPU systems into tightly integrated shared-memory structures. However, current software still mostly treats these coherent interconnects simply as high-speed networks. Simultaneously, the demand for serving Large Language Models under latency constraints has shifted GPU workload optimization from being throughput-driven to latency-bound, necessitating latency-oriented scaling methods beyond Tensor Parallelism (TP). Thus, we introduce CTA-pipelining, an execution paradigm designed to exploit shared-memory multi-GPU systems. As a latency-oriented spatial scaling technique, CTA-pipelining leverages dependencies at the Cooperative Thread Array level, enabling concurrent execution of dependent kernels across GPUs. We demonstrate its capability using CUTLASS, cuBLAS, and NCCL libraries on 8-GPU H200 and B200 systems. Results show on 2-layer GEMM, representing the MLP operation, CTA-pipelining reduces latency by up to 31.8% compared to micro-batching, and 29.6% compared to TP. It can also be combined with TP as an orthogonal scaling dimension to further push the latency boundary.

papers.title: Feedback Manipulation Regularization: Enabling Offline Agent Alignment for Imitation Learning
papers.brief: 提出了一种算法无关的方法——反馈操控正则化（FMR），将评估性反馈作为修正信号融入模仿学习，实现单阶段离线训练中的智能体对齐，无需多阶段流水线。
papers.tldr: 提出FMR方法，利用评估反馈作为修正信号，提升模仿学习策略的人类价值对齐效果
papers.what_it_is: 提出了一种算法无关的方法——反馈操控正则化（FMR），将评估性反馈作为修正信号融入模仿学习，实现单阶段离线训练中的智能体对齐，无需多阶段流水线。
key_points: FMR与具体算法无关，可与多种模仿学习算法结合使用
在改造后的Safety Gymnasium环境中验证，最高实现98%的误对齐率降低
在数据稀缺场景下依然鲁棒，即使演示数据含噪声或对齐质量差也能有效工作
papers.why_notable: 现有对齐方法多为多阶段流水线且针对语言生成场景，FMR首次系统探索在完全序列决策环境中单阶段离线对齐，填补了模仿学习与人类反馈对齐之间的研究空白，具有较强实用价值。
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) research has increasingly shifted focus towards alignment, ensuring agents learn behaviors adhering to human values. While human demonstrations and feedback have proven crucial for alignment, existing approaches predominantly combine these signals using multi-stage pipelines designed for the contextual bandit framing of language generation. Yet little work explores how these complementary inputs can serve as a richer, interconnected signal for single-stage offline training in fully sequential decision-making environments. We propose Feedback Manipulation Regularization (FMR), an algorithm-agnostic method that harnesses evaluative feedback as a corrective signal to improve the alignment of imitation learning policies. We adapt Safety Gymnasium environments to be a principled testbed for alignment evaluation, demonstrating improved aptitude and up to a 98\% reduction in misalignment across a range of imitation learning algorithms. FMR remains robust in limited data regimes, even when learning from scarce aligned and uninformative noisy demonstrations.

papers.title: NFTR: From Provable Mode-Averaging to Geodesic Subgoal Selection in Offline Goal-Conditioned RL
papers.brief: 针对HIQL中子目标选择的两大失效模式（乐观偏差与模式坍塌），提出NFTR方法：用条件归一化流替代高斯策略，并引入基于三角不等式的松弛分数对AWR权重进行乘法修正，从理论上保证子目标沿测地线选取且在随机动态下保持稳定。
papers.tldr: 提出NFTR方法，用归一化流与三角松弛重加权解决离线目标条件RL中的子目标选择失效问题
papers.what_it_is: 针对HIQL中子目标选择的两大失效模式（乐观偏差与模式坍塌），提出NFTR方法：用条件归一化流替代高斯策略，并引入基于三角不等式的松弛分数对AWR权重进行乘法修正，从理论上保证子目标沿测地线选取且在随机动态下保持稳定。
key_points: 理论证明归一化流是AWR子目标选择的最小生成类，从根本上避免高斯均值落入不可达区域的模式坍塌
三角松弛分数无需精确距离估计，仅利用架构三角不等式对绕路代价过高的子目标进行降权，在确定性MDP中于测地线上恒为零
RWDR目标保留AWR的种群级单调改进性质，并给出三项子优化分解，理论保证完整
papers.why_notable: 首次从可证明的模式平均角度分析离线目标条件RL子目标选择失效，提供了理论严格且实践可行的修复方案，对分层强化学习的鲁棒性研究具有重要参考价值
papers.abstract: Hierarchical Implicit Q-Learning (HIQL), an offline goal-conditioned RL method, selects subgoals by value-function advantages alone. This rule has two coupled failure modes. Optimistic bias treats lucky stochastic outcomes as skillful choices, and mode collapse reduces a multi-modal subgoal distribution to a single Gaussian mean that often falls in unreachable regions. We propose NFTR (Normalizing Flows subgoal policies with Triangle-slack Reweighting). A conditional Normalizing Flow replaces the Gaussian policy, and a closed-form mode-averaging result identifies NFs as the minimal generative class for AWR-based subgoal selection. A triangle slack score, built on the architectural triangle inequality without relying on distance accuracy, multiplicatively corrects the AWR weight to downweight subgoals whose detour cost exceeds average reachability. Triangle-slack vanishes on geodesics in deterministic MDPs and remains a conservative upper bound on composability violation under stochastic dynamics. The RWDR objective preserves AWR's population-level monotonic improvement and admits a three-term suboptimality decomposition. Together, these two ingredients yield subgoal selection that provably avoids the Gaussian collapse described above and remains stable under stochastic dynamics. GitHub page: https://github.com/erdemtbao/NFTR

papers.title: False Confidence: Automated Labels Confound Fairness Audits in Cervical Spine Segmentation
papers.brief: 本文对颈椎MRI分割模型进行首次公平性审计，揭示机器生成的"银标签"相比专家"金标签"会系统性高估性能约8个Dice点，并将年龄组的公平性结论从不显著变为显著，提出"虚假置信度"这一新型偏差机制。
papers.tldr: 银标签偏差导致颈椎MRI分割公平性审计结论失真，参考标签来源是一阶混淆因素
papers.what_it_is: 本文对颈椎MRI分割模型进行首次公平性审计，揭示机器生成的"银标签"相比专家"金标签"会系统性高估性能约8个Dice点，并将年龄组的公平性结论从不显著变为显著，提出"虚假置信度"这一新型偏差机制。
key_points: 银标签（机器生成）与金标签（专家标注）评估同一模型时，Dice分数差异约8个点，且会改变公平性审计结论
提出两种偏差类型：false magnitude（差距膨胀）和false confidence（组内方差坍缩），后者是本文发现的新机制
参考标签来源（provenance）是分割评估中的一阶混淆因素，公平性声明必须注明参考标签类型
papers.why_notable: 首次系统揭示数据集中银标签对公平性审计的混淆效应，对医疗AI评估规范具有重要方法论意义，提醒研究者和监管者不能忽视参考标签来源
papers.abstract: Automated segmentation of cervical-spine MRI is increasingly used in clinical workflows, yet no fairness audit exists for this anatomy. We show that auditing these segmentation tasks is complicated by a common property of modern segmentation datasets: expert-annotated gold labels are expensive, so abundant machine-generated (silver) labels are added to limit annotation cost. This matters because the reference used to judge a model can itself be biased. In this study, we present the first fairness audit of cervical-spine MRI segmentation across sex, age, and race using the CSpineSeg dataset. We observe that the deployed model is demographically fair, but the choice of reference label, however, is not neutral. Because a dataset's silver labels are generated by a model trained on its gold labels, any new model trained on those same gold labels agrees more with the silver labels than with expert truth: scoring identical predictions against silver rather than gold overestimates performance by ~8 Dice points and turns the fairness verdict for age from non-significant to significant - not by the gap inflation Parikh et al. report (which we term false magnitude) but by collapsing within-group variance (which we term false confidence). Reference-label provenance is thus a first-order confounder in segmentation evaluation: performance and fairness should be reported against expert labels, and any fairness claim stated together with the provenance of its reference.

papers.title: Explaining Near-Zero Hessian Eigenvalues Through Approximate Symmetries in Neural Networks
papers.brief: 本文揭示了神经网络训练损失Hessian矩阵中大量近零特征值的起源：它们对应于网络参数化连续对称性被弱破缺后产生的伪Goldstone模式，并在深度线性网络、ReLU网络及卷积网络中验证了这一机制。
papers.tldr: 神经网络Hessian矩阵近零特征值源于参数化的近似连续对称性（伪Goldstone模式）
papers.what_it_is: 本文揭示了神经网络训练损失Hessian矩阵中大量近零特征值的起源：它们对应于网络参数化连续对称性被弱破缺后产生的伪Goldstone模式，并在深度线性网络、ReLU网络及卷积网络中验证了这一机制。
key_points: 深度线性网络中参数化具有精确连续对称性，产生精确零模（flat directions），并显式构造了对应特征向量
ReLU非线性作为微扰弱破缺这些对称性，将零模提升为近零的伪Goldstone模式，构成Hessian谱的bulk部分
高曲率方向与对称子空间正交，而bulk特征向量几乎完全落在对称子空间内，在两层ReLU学生-教师模型和CIFAR-10训练网络中均得到验证
papers.why_notable: 首次从物理学对称性自发破缺（Goldstone定理）视角系统解释了神经网络Hessian谱bulk的起源，为理解损失景观几何、优化动力学及泛化提供了新的理论框架，具有重要的理论价值。
papers.abstract: The Hessian of the training loss governs the local geometry of the loss landscape, yet despite existing explanations for its largest eigenvalues, the origin of the vast multitude of vanishingly small eigenvalues remains elusive. We argue that the bulk consists of the weakly lifted pseudo-Goldstone modes of the continuous symmetries of the network parametrization. In deep linear networks these symmetries are exact: they generate flat directions and hence exact zero modes, whose eigenvectors we construct explicitly. Introducing a ReLU nonlinearity as a perturbation, we show that it breaks these symmetries weakly and explicitly. Resolving the spectrum at the level of eigenvectors, we find that the high-curvature directions are orthogonal to the symmetry subspace, while the bulk lies almost entirely within it. We demonstrate the mechanism in a two-layer ReLU student--teacher model and in a network trained on CIFAR-10. A convolutional example demonstrates that the same diagnostic extends beyond fully connected layers. Together, these results link the Hessian bulk to weakly broken symmetries and clarify the origin of near-zero modes.

papers.title: Shift & Drift: A Zero-Shot Benchmark for Generalizable and Robust Autonomous Driving Motion Planning
papers.brief: 提出Shift & Drift双轨基准，通过语义迁移（跨城市/跨数据集零样本评估）和状态分布漂移（随机执行扰动注入）两个维度，系统压力测试自动驾驶运动规划器的泛化性与鲁棒性。
papers.tldr: Shift & Drift：评估自动驾驶运动规划器在语义迁移和状态扰动下泛化能力的零样本基准
papers.what_it_is: 提出Shift & Drift双轨基准，通过语义迁移（跨城市/跨数据集零样本评估）和状态分布漂移（随机执行扰动注入）两个维度，系统压力测试自动驾驶运动规划器的泛化性与鲁棒性。
key_points: 语义迁移轨道：将DeepScenario Open 3D航拍数据集转换为nuPlan仿真框架，覆盖德国4座城市+旧金山共1182个场景，实现零样本跨域评估
状态漂移轨道：向自车动力学注入随机扰动，量化规划器对时序相关执行噪声的鲁棒性
实验发现：模仿学习方法在分布内表现优异，但在行人密集场景和执行扰动下显著失效；强化学习规划器展现更优雅的性能退化，安全性和进度指标更稳健
papers.why_notable: 揭示了模仿保真度与闭环鲁棒性之间的经验性权衡，填补了现有大规模驾驶基准在跨域泛化和执行鲁棒性评估上的空白，为可靠部署提供严格的评测工具。
papers.abstract: While closed-loop motion planners trained on large-scale, object-level datasets, e.g., nuPlan, demonstrate strong in-distribution (ID) performance, their generalization to novel urban topologies and recovery mechanisms following execution perturbations remain under-explored. To address this, we present Shift & Drift, a novel dual-track benchmark designed to rigorously stress-test motion planners across two critical axes of distribution shift: (1) The Semantic Shift Track leverages a novel conversion pipeline that transforms the aerial, DeepScenario Open 3D dataset into the nuPlan simulation framework. This enables zero-shot evaluation of planners trained on North American and Singaporean data against 1,182 scenarios spanning four German cities and the US city of San Francisco featuring dense pedestrian-cyclist interactions. (2) The State-Distribution Drift Track injects stochastic perturbations into the ego vehicle's dynamics to quantify robustness against compounding execution errors. Based on this, we systematically evaluate the failure modes of diverse planning paradigms under semantic and state-distribution shifts. While imitation learning methods achieve high scores in ID benchmarks, they exhibit significant failures under semantic shift, particularly in pedestrian-dense environments, and suffer from persistent drift when subjected to temporally correlated actuation noise. In contrast, the evaluated reinforcement-learning-based planner demonstrates more graceful degradation, maintaining higher safety and progress metrics across both tracks. Our findings reveal an empirical trade-off between imitation fidelity and closed-loop resilience, providing the community with a rigorous benchmark to evaluate progress toward reliable deployment.

papers.title: GradInf: Gradient Estimation as Probabilistic Inference
papers.brief: 提出梯度推断（Gradient Inference）方法，将概率程序的梯度估计问题形式化规约为相关的概率推断问题，并基于此构建了可编程系统GradInf，支持自动化、可靠的梯度估计器设计。
papers.tldr: 将梯度估计问题规约为概率推断问题，构建新型梯度估计框架GradInf
papers.what_it_is: 提出梯度推断（Gradient Inference）方法，将概率程序的梯度估计问题形式化规约为相关的概率推断问题，并基于此构建了可编程系统GradInf，支持自动化、可靠的梯度估计器设计。
key_points: 核心思路：通过耦合（coupling）和因子分解（factorization）两种统计操作，将梯度估计问题转化为概率推断问题，再对其解求导得到梯度估计器
系统实现：GradInf基于高阶概率程序的源到源变换，结合信息流类型系统（information-flow typing）实现随机变量的因子分解与部分求值，正确性由指称语义保证
实验效果：能够复现文献中主流梯度估计器，并构造出超越现有最优基线的新型估计器
papers.why_notable: 首次将梯度估计与概率推断统一在严格的形式框架下，使得概率推断领域的丰富算法工具箱可直接用于设计梯度估计器，为科学计算和机器学习中的随机优化提供了原则性、可扩展的新范式。
papers.abstract: Gradient estimation -- the task of computing the gradient of the expected value of a probabilistic program -- has diverse applications in scientific computing, but is notoriously difficult because of issues such as high-dimensional integration, discrete random choices, and complex stochastic dependencies. This article introduces gradient inference, a new approach to developing sound and efficient gradient estimators for probabilistic programs. Gradient inference rests on a formal reduction from a gradient estimation problem to a closely related probabilistic inference problem, whose solution can be differentiated to obtain a gradient estimator. This inference problem is obtained by applying two powerful statistical operations -- coupling and factorization -- to the input probabilistic program. Our reduction lets us leverage the rich toolkit of probabilistic inference algorithms to design novel gradient estimators that extend and improve upon existing methods. We introduce GradInf, a probabilistic programming system that facilitates the sound and automated implementation of gradient inference. GradInf is centered around programmable source-to-source transformations for coupling and factorizing higher-order probabilistic programs, whose soundness is proven in terms of a denotational semantics. Key to our development is the use of information-flow typing to allow random choices in a probabilistic program to be factored out and partially evaluated, which improves our ability to deploy sophisticated probabilistic inference algorithms. The resulting system offers practitioners a principled framework for designing gradient estimators. We apply GradInf to several challenging case studies, showing that it can express prominent gradient estimators from the literature and enables the construction of new state-of-the-art estimators that outperform the best existing baselines.

papers.title: Predicting Pseudo-nitzschia harmful algal blooms along the Portuguese Coast using satellite-derived predictors
papers.brief: 构建了一个时空机器学习框架，仅使用卫星衍生预测变量（海表温度、叶绿素等1000+特征）预测葡萄牙大西洋海岸的伪菱形藻有害藻华发生，并采用严格的时空交叉验证策略模拟真实预报条件。
papers.tldr: 利用卫星数据与机器学习预测葡萄牙海岸有害藻华，AUC达0.77
papers.what_it_is: 构建了一个时空机器学习框架，仅使用卫星衍生预测变量（海表温度、叶绿素等1000+特征）预测葡萄牙大西洋海岸的伪菱形藻有害藻华发生，并采用严格的时空交叉验证策略模拟真实预报条件。
key_points: 使用10年数据（2013-2023，1440条观测）和1000+卫星特征，Extra Trees模型AUC达0.77±0.06
设计了考虑河流影响的空间聚类方案，并同时剔除整年和空间簇以防止数据泄漏
特征重要性分析显示季节结构、空间背景和滞后环境条件是主导因素，生物指标在物理条件有利时进一步细化预测
papers.why_notable: 为沿海有害藻华早期预警系统提供了可操作的卫星支持方案，严格的时空验证策略使结果更贴近实际预报场景，对渔业管理和生态保护具有直接实用价值。
papers.abstract: Pseudo-nitzschia diatoms pose recurrent risks to coastal ecosystems and shellfish harvesting along the Portuguese Atlantic coast. Here we develop and evaluate a spatio-temporal machine-learning framework to predict harmful algal bloom (HAB) occurrence using exclusively satellite-derived predictors under realistic forecasting constraints. We characterised environmental and biological variability across shellfish production zones (L1-L9) using 5,882 observations, providing system-wide context. Predictive models were developed for zones L1-L2, a hotspot for Pseudo-nitzschia and domoic acid events, using a decade-long dataset (2013-2023; 1,440 observations; more than 1,000 satellite-based predictors including sea surface temperature, an upwelling index, chlorophyll-a, and plankton functional types). Sampling locations were partitioned into ecologically meaningful sub-regions using a river-aware spatial clustering scheme. A stringent spatio-temporal cross-validation strategy that simultaneously withholds entire years and spatial clusters prevents leakage and closely mimics real-world forecasting conditions. HAB occurrence proved moderately predictable across model classes and feature configurations. Ensemble tree-based methods achieved the strongest discrimination: Random Forest reached 0.74 +/- 0.05 with environmental predictors; Extra Trees reached 0.77 +/- 0.06 with biological variables added. Feature-importance analyses revealed that seasonal structure, spatial context, and lagged environmental conditions dominate model decisions, while biological indicators refine bloom likelihood within physically favourable periods. The framework demonstrates operationally relevant skill for satellite-supported HAB early-warning systems along eastern boundary upwelling coasts.

papers.title: Graph-Regularized Deep Learning for EEG-Based Emotion Recognition with Psychologically-Grounded Label Structure
papers.brief: 提出一种图正则化深度学习框架，将情绪类别建模为图节点，边编码基于维度情绪理论的心理邻近关系，通过三种正则化策略（图标签平滑、图拉普拉斯换向距离、切片Wasserstein距离）约束模型预测符合情绪心理拓扑结构。
papers.tldr: 图正则化框架将情绪心理拓扑结构融入EEG情绪识别，提升准确率并减少心理不合理误分类
papers.what_it_is: 提出一种图正则化深度学习框架，将情绪类别建模为图节点，边编码基于维度情绪理论的心理邻近关系，通过三种正则化策略（图标签平滑、图拉普拉斯换向距离、切片Wasserstein距离）约束模型预测符合情绪心理拓扑结构。
key_points: 三种互补正则化策略按计算复杂度递增排列：图标签平滑、谱图理论换向距离、最优传输切片Wasserstein距离
在SEED-IV和SEED-V数据集上验证，最佳情况准确率提升+5.42%，心理不合理误分类减少39%
框架与架构无关，在AudioTransformer、Conformer、DCGNN三种骨干网络上均有一致提升
papers.why_notable: 首次将情绪心理学拓扑结构系统性地引入EEG情绪识别的损失函数设计，不仅提升性能指标，还显著降低心理不合理预测，对脑机接口和心理健康监测具有实际意义。
papers.abstract: EEG-based emotion recognition is critical for mental health monitoring and affective brain-computer interfaces, yet existing deep learning approaches often treat emotion classes as isolated labels, ignoring their psychological interdependencies. We propose a graph-regularized learning framework that conceptualizes emotions as nodes in a graph where edges encode proximity based on dimensional emotion theories. We adapt three complementary regularization strategies--Graph Label Smoothing (intuitive soft labeling), Commuting distance on graph via Graph Laplacian (spectral graph theory), and Sliced Wasserstein Distance (optimal transport on graph)--ordered by increasing computational complexity. These strategies penalize model predictions that deviate from the established emotion topology. Our framework is evaluated across three representative backbone architectures: AudioTransformer (pure transformer), Conformer (CNN-transformer hybrid), and DCGNN (causal graph neural network), demonstrating architecture-agnostic benefits. Experiments on SEED-IV (4 classes) and SEED-V (5 classes) datasets show consistent improvements: best case up to +5.42% accuracy and 39% reduction in psychologically implausible misclassifications. Ultimately, our framework help raise the upper bound of performance achievable with standard approaches. Code will be released.

papers.title: Distributionally Faithful Imputation via Positive Semi-Definite Kernel Density Estimation
papers.brief: 提出PSD Impute方法，将MCAR缺失值填补问题转化为密度估计问题，利用正半定核密度估计构建凸经验风险优化，通过Newton内点法求解，使填补后数据的观测边际分布与原始数据精确匹配。
papers.tldr: 基于正半定核密度估计，将缺失值填补重构为凸优化问题，实现分布忠实的数据填补
